name: agentkv
description: AgentKV: encrypted, x402-paid persistent memory for agents. Stores values client-side encrypted (AES-256-GCM) so the server is zero-knowledge. Wallet address is the namespace — no accounts or API keys needed.

private_key.title: Wallet private key (optional)
private_key.description: EVM private key (hex, 0x-prefixed) for the wallet that pays and owns the namespace. Leave blank and AgentKV mints + manages a local wallet for you on first use (then fund + back it up).

endpoint.title: AgentKV endpoint
endpoint.description: The AgentKV API endpoint. Defaults to the hosted service.

network.title: Network (optional)
network.description: CAIP-2 network id: eip155:8453 (Base mainnet, default) or eip155:84532 (Base Sepolia testnet).

encryption_key.title: Encryption key (optional, advanced)
encryption_key.description: Override the AES-256-GCM key (hex). Defaults to a key derived (HKDF) from the private key.

max_spend_usd.title: Max per-operation spend, USD (optional)
max_spend_usd.description: Refuse any single operation that would cost more than this. Leave empty for no per-op cap.

max_session_spend_usd.title: Max session spend, USD (optional)
max_session_spend_usd.description: Refuse operations once cumulative spend across the whole MCP session exceeds this. Leave empty for no session cap.
